controls.control_objective: To ensure , for the purpose of ensuring the compliance with the provisions of the act or of any rule, regulation, notification, direction or order made thereund
controls.control_description:
Further, in terms of Section 11 (2) of FEMA, 1999, the Reserve Bank may, for the
purpose of ensuring the compliance with the provisions of the Act or of any rule,
regulation, notification, direction or order made thereunder, direct any authorized person
to furnish such information, in such manner, as it deems fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , for the purpose of ensuring the compliance with the provisions of the act or of any rule, regulation, notification, direction or order made thereund

controls.control_objective: To ensure impose on the authorized person a penalty for contravening any direction given by the reserve bank under this act or failing to file any return as dir
controls.control_description:
In this connection, it is reiterated that in terms of Section
11(3) of FEMA, 1999, the Reserve Bank may impose on the authorized person a penalty
for contravening any direction given by the Reserve Bank under this Act or failing to file
any return as directed by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to impose on the authorized person a penalty for contravening any direction given by the reserve bank under this act or failing to file any return as dir

controls.control_objective: To ensure bring the guidelines contained in this circular to the notice of their constituents
controls.control_description:
All AD Category - I banks and Authorised banks may bring the guidelines contained
in this circular to the notice of their constituents.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to bring the guidelines contained in this circular to the notice of their constituents

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on an application made by the person committing such contravention (hereafter referred as 'applicant'), be compounded within one hundred and eighty
controls.control_description:
1.2 In terms of Section 15 of the FEMA, 1999, any contravention under section 13 of
FEMA 1999 {except that of Section 3(a) of the Act} may, on an application made by
the person committing such contravention (hereafter referred as 'applicant'), be
compounded within one hundred and eighty days from the date of receipt of such
application, by the officers of the Reserve Bank, as prescribed in Rule 4 of the
Compounding Rules, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , on an application made by the person committing such contravention (hereafter referred as 'applicant'), be compounded within one hundred and eighty

controls.control_objective: To ensure , upon adjudication, be liable to a penalty up to thrice the sum involved in such contravention where the amount is quantifiable, or up to rupees two
controls.control_description:
1.3 Accordingly, in terms of Section 13(1) of the Act, if any person contravenes any
provision of FEMA, 1999, or any rule, regulation, notification, direction or order issued
in exercise of the powers under this Act, or contravenes any condition subject to which
an authorization is issued by the Reserve Bank, he shall, upon adjudication, be liable
to a penalty up to thrice the sum involved in such contravention where the amount is
quantifiable, or up to Rupees Two lakhs where the amount is not directly quantifiable,
and where the contravention is a continuing one, further penalty which may extend to
Rupees Five thousand for every day after the first day during which the contravention
continues.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , upon adjudication, be liable to a penalty up to thrice the sum involved in such contravention where the amount is quantifiable, or up to rupees two

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compounded
controls.control_description:
However,
compounding of contraventions of cases falling under Rule 4(2) and Rule 9 of the
Compounding Rules, 2024 shall not be compounded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compounded

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compounded by the compounding authorities of the reserve bank at the regional offices
controls.control_description:
2.1 In order to facilitate operational convenience, contraventions of following Rules
and/or Regulations issued under the Act shall be compounded by the compounding
authorities of the Reserve Bank at the Regional Offices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compounded by the compounding authorities of the reserve bank at the regional offices

controls.control_objective: To ensure 3, 2000 regulations under notification no
controls.control_description:
FEMA 20/2000-RB dated May 3, 2000
Regulations under Notification No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 3, 2000 regulations under notification no

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compounded by the compounding authorities of the reserve bank attached to the fed, co, cell at new delhi office: fema notification fema 7/2000-rb
controls.control_description:
2.2 The contraventions of Rules and/or Regulations related to Liaison/ Branch/ Project
office (LO/ BO/ PO), Non-Resident Foreign Account (NRFAD) and Immovable
Property (IP) shall be compounded by the compounding authorities of the Reserve
Bank attached to the FED, CO, Cell at New Delhi office:
FEMA Notification
FEMA 7/2000-RB, dated 3-5-2000 / FEMA 7(R) /2015-RB dated 21-1-2016 / Rule 21 of Foreign Exchange Management (Overseas Investment) Rules, 2022 dated 22-08-2022 FEMA 21/2000-RB, dated 3-5-2000 / FEMA 21(R)/2018-RB, dated 26-3-2018 /Chapter IX of Foreign Exchange Management (Non-Debt Instruments) Rules, 2019 dated 17-10-2019
FEMA 22/2000-RB, dated 3-5-2000 / FEMA 22(R) /2016-RB dated 31-3-2016
FEMA 5/2000-RB, dated 3-5-2000 / FEMA 5(R)/2016-RB dated 1-4-16
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compounded by the compounding authorities of the reserve bank attached to the fed, co, cell at new delhi office: fema notification fema 7/2000-rb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the applicants to the respective regional offices under whose jurisdiction they fall or to fed, co cell, new delhi, as applicable
controls.control_description:
2.3 Accordingly, compounding applications related to any of the above contraventions
shall be submitted by the applicants to the respective Regional Offices under whose
jurisdiction they fall or to FED, CO Cell, New Delhi, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the applicants to the respective regional offices under whose jurisdiction they fall or to fed, co cell, new delhi, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the cell for effective implementation of fema (cefa), foreign exchange department, reserve bank of india, 11th floor, central office b
controls.control_description:
2.4 For all other contraventions, applications may be submitted to the Cell for Effective
implementation of FEMA (CEFA), Foreign Exchange Department, Reserve Bank of
India, 11th floor, Central Office Building, Shahid Bhagat Singh Road, Fort, Mumbai -
400001.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the cell for effective implementation of fema (cefa), foreign exchange department, reserve bank of india, 11th floor, central office b

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a compounding application, along with the relevant documents, physically or through pravaah portal of the reserve bank, either suo moto or base
controls.control_description:
3.1 An applicant may submit a compounding application, along with the relevant
documents, physically or through PRAVAAH Portal of the Reserve Bank, either suo
moto or based on a Memorandum of Contraventions issued by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a compounding application, along with the relevant documents, physically or through pravaah portal of the reserve bank, either suo moto or base

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply
controls.control_description:
Where an applicant, after issue of the Memorandum of contraventions issued by the
Reserve Bank, does not opt for compounding within the period as may be stated in the
Memorandum of Contravention, the relevant provisions of the FEMA, 1999, shall apply.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted along with the prescribed fee of ₹10,000/- (plus applicable gst, which at present is 18%) by way of demand draft in favour of "reserve ba
controls.control_description:
3.2 All compounding applications shall be submitted along with the prescribed fee of
₹10,000/- (plus applicable GST, which at present is 18%) by way of demand draft in
favour of "Reserve Bank of India" and payable at the concerned Regional Office/ CO
Cell, New Delhi/ Central Office or through National Electronic Fund Transfer (NEFT),
or other permissible electronic or online modes of payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted along with the prescribed fee of ₹10,000/- (plus applicable gst, which at present is 18%) by way of demand draft in favour of "reserve ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made as soon as possible but not later than 2 hours from time of payment, through an email as per the template provided in para b of annexure i
controls.control_description:
It may be
ensured that intimation of payment of application fee, to respective Regional Office,
CO Cell, or Central Office, as the case may be, shall be made as soon as possible but
not later than 2 hours from time of payment, through an email as per the template
provided in Para B of Annexure I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made as soon as possible but not later than 2 hours from time of payment, through an email as per the template provided in para b of annexure i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accompanied by the payment details including the utr number evidencing the payment of the application fee
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the compounding application must
be accompanied by the payment details including the UTR number evidencing the
payment of the application fee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accompanied by the payment details including the utr number evidencing the payment of the application fee

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain the contact details i
controls.control_description:
Applications submitted to the Reserve Bank must contain the contact
details i.e., Name of the applicant/Authorised official or representative of the applicant,
telephone/ mobile number and email ID.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain the contact details i

controls.control_objective: To ensure also furnish the details as per annex-ii relating to foreign direct investment, external commercial borrowings, overseas direct investment and branch
controls.control_description:
3.4 Along with the compounding application in the prescribed format, the applicant
shall also furnish the details as per Annex-II relating to Foreign Direct Investment,
External Commercial Borrowings, Overseas Direct Investment and Branch Office/
Liaison Office, as applicable;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also furnish the details as per annex-ii relating to foreign direct investment, external commercial borrowings, overseas direct investment and branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure be returned where administrative action has not been completed by the applicant or the application is incomplete, or the application fee has not been
controls.control_description:
3.5 A compounding application shall be returned where administrative action has not
been completed by the applicant or the application is incomplete, or the application fee
has not been paid by the applicant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be returned where administrative action has not been completed by the applicant or the application is incomplete, or the application fee has not been

controls.control_objective: To ensure be returned in case of return of the compounding application
controls.control_description:
The application fee, if paid, shall not be returned
in case of return of the compounding application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be returned in case of return of the compounding application

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken as the date of receipt of the application
controls.control_description:
3.7 In case of an incomplete application, wherever the applicant is allowed by the
Reserve Bank to submit any necessary information or documents within a reasonable
time, then the date of receipt of such information or documents, as the case may be,
shall be taken as the date of receipt of the application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken as the date of receipt of the application

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean such action as may be necessary with respect to the transactions involved in such contravention (as per rule 8(1) of the compounding rules, 2024)
controls.control_description:
Certain cases not eligible for compounding
Explanation: Administrative action shall mean such action as may be necessary with
respect to the transactions involved in such contravention (as per Rule 8(1) of the
Compounding Rules, 2024) and shall include such corrective action that shall be
undertaken by the applicant to bring the transaction involved in contravention in
compliance with applicable provisions of FEMA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean such action as may be necessary with respect to the transactions involved in such contravention (as per rule 8(1) of the compounding rules, 2024)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compounded, and the relevant provisions of the act shall apply
controls.control_description:
4.1 In respect of a contravention committed by any person (applicant) within a period
of three years from the date on which a similar contravention was committed and the
same was compounded, such contraventions shall not be compounded, and the
relevant provisions of the Act shall apply.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compounded, and the relevant provisions of the act shall apply

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be a first contravention
controls.control_description:
Any contravention committed after the expiry
of a period of three years from the date on which a similar contravention was previously
compounded shall be deemed to be a first contravention.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be a first contravention

controls.control_objective: To ensure be processed unless the requisite administrative action is completed by the applicant
controls.control_description:
4.2 No compounding application shall be processed unless the requisite
administrative action is completed by the applicant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be processed unless the requisite administrative action is completed by the applicant

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to the doe for further investigation and necessary action under the act
controls.control_description:
transactions suspected of money
laundering, terror financing or affecting sovereignty and integrity of the nation or where
the contravener fails to pay the sum for which contravention was compounded within
the specified period in terms of the compounding order, shall be referred to the DoE
for further investigation and necessary action under the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to the doe for further investigation and necessary action under the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for compounding by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
4.4 Further, in terms of the Rule 9 of Compounding Rules, 2024, transactions, in
which amount involved is not quantifiable or, attracting provisions of Section 37A of the
Act or, where the Adjudicating Authority has already passed an order imposing penalty
under section 13 of the Act or where the DoE is of the view that the compounding
proceeding relates to a serious contravention suspected of money laundering, terror
financing or affecting sovereignty and integrity of the nation, contraventions of such
transactions shall not be eligible for compounding by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for compounding by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for compounding by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
4.5 Also, in terms of Rule 4(1) of Compounding Rules, 2024, transactions involving
contravention of Section 3(a) of the Act shall not be eligible for compounding by the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for compounding by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine whether:
controls.control_description:
4.6 It is clarified that whenever a contravention is identified by the Reserve Bank or
brought to its notice by the person involved in contravention, the Reserve Bank shall
examine whether:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine whether:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compounded, and necessary compounding procedure must be followed or
controls.control_description:
(i) such contravention(s) may be compounded, and necessary compounding
procedure must be followed or
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compounded, and necessary compounding procedure must be followed or

controls.control_objective: To ensure , further, be noted that the guidance note is meant only for the purpose of broadly indicating the basis on which the compounding amount is derived by
controls.control_description:
It may, further, be noted that the guidance note is meant only for the
purpose of broadly indicating the basis on which the compounding amount is derived
by the compounding authorities in the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , further, be noted that the guidance note is meant only for the purpose of broadly indicating the basis on which the compounding amount is derived by

controls.control_objective: To ensure sometimes vary, depending on the circumstances of the case considering the factors indicated in the foregoing paragraph
controls.control_description:
The actual compounding amount
payable may sometimes vary, depending on the circumstances of the case considering
the factors indicated in the foregoing paragraph.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sometimes vary, depending on the circumstances of the case considering the factors indicated in the foregoing paragraph

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine the application based on the documents and submissions made in the application and assess whether contravention can be compounded in accordance with the compounding rules, 2024 and
controls.control_description:
5.1 On receipt of an application, the Reserve Bank shall examine the application
based on the documents and submissions made in the application and assess whether
contravention can be compounded in accordance with the Compounding Rules, 2024
and, if so, the sum involved in the contravention.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine the application based on the documents and submissions made in the application and assess whether contravention can be compounded in accordance with the compounding rules, 2024 and

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for any information, or any other documents relevant to the compounding proceedings
controls.control_description:
5.2 The Compounding Authority may call for any information, or any other documents
relevant to the compounding proceedings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to call for any information, or any other documents relevant to the compounding proceedings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable to be returned
controls.control_description:
In case the contravener fails to submit the
additional information/documents called for within the specified period, the application
for compounding shall be liable to be returned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable to be returned

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into consideration for the purpose of passing compounding order and determining amount on payment of which contravention shall be compounded: a) undue gains i.e., the amount of gain of unfair advantage
controls.control_description:
5.3 The following factors, which are only indicative, shall be taken into consideration
for the purpose of passing compounding order and determining amount on payment of
which contravention shall be compounded:
a) Undue gains i.e., the amount of gain of unfair advantage, wherever
quantifiable, made as a result of the contravention (or) economic benefits
accruing to the contravener from delayed compliance or compliance avoided;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into consideration for the purpose of passing compounding order and determining amount on payment of which contravention shall be compounded: a) undue gains i.e., the amount of gain of unfair advantage

controls.control_objective: To ensure be imposed ii
controls.control_description:
FEMA 20/ FEMA 20(R)/ FEMA 395
Compounding amount
Amount under Contravention (in INR)
that may be imposed
ii.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be imposed ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated on 10% of total project cost
controls.control_description: In case of Project Office, the amount imposed shall be calculated on 10% of total project cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated on 10% of total project cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be 10% of the cost of project)
controls.control_description:
FCGPR (B) or FLA Returns - FEMA 20 / FEMA 20 (R) / FEMA 120/ FEMA 395/ FEMA 400

controls.control_description:
Fixed Amount: INR 5,00,000/- (applied once for each regulation/ rule contravened, in a compounding application) plus

controls.control_objective: To ensure be imposed as percentage of "amount duration of contravention under contravention" less than 1 year 0
controls.control_description:
5] All other non- reporting contraventions
Fixed Amount: INR 50,000/- (applied once for each regulation/ rule contravened, in a compounding application) plus

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 300% of the sum involved in contravention
controls.control_description:
The compounding amount payable shall not exceed 300% of the sum involved
in contravention.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 300% of the sum involved in contravention

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than amount of simple interest @5% p
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than amount of simple interest @5% p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be neutralized to a reasonable extent by adding the same to the compounding amount calculated as per matrix above
controls.control_description:
In cases where it is established that the contravener has made undue gains, the
amount thereof may be neutralized to a reasonable extent by adding the same
to the compounding amount calculated as per matrix above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be neutralized to a reasonable extent by adding the same to the compounding amount calculated as per matrix above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be capped at inr 2,00,000/- for contravention of each regulation/ rule (applied in a compounding application) with respect to contraventions under row
controls.control_description:
Subject to satisfaction of the compounding authority, based on the nature of
contravention, exceptional circumstances/ facts involved in case, and in wider
public interest, the maximum compounding amount imposed may be capped at
INR 2,00,000/- for contravention of each regulation/ rule (applied in a
compounding application) with respect to contraventions under row 5 of the
above computation matrix.2
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be capped at inr 2,00,000/- for contravention of each regulation/ rule (applied in a compounding application) with respect to contraventions under row

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered proportionately {(approx
controls.control_description:
For calculating compounding amount in respect of reporting contraventions under
para I.1 of above matrix, the period of contravention may be considered
proportionately {(approx.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered proportionately {(approx

controls.control_objective: To ensure pass a compounding order after affording an opportunity of being heard to the applicant as expeditiously as possible and not later than 180 days from
controls.control_description:
6.1 The Compounding Authority shall pass a compounding order after affording an
opportunity of being heard to the applicant as expeditiously as possible and not later
than 180 days from the date of receipt of such compounding application by Reserve
Bank and complete in all respects, on the basis of the averments made in the
application as well as other documents and submissions made in this context by the
contravener during the personal hearings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pass a compounding order after affording an opportunity of being heard to the applicant as expeditiously as possible and not later than 180 days from

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified in the compounding order
controls.control_description:
Appearing for or opting
out of personal hearing does not have any bearing whatsoever on the compounding
amount that may be specified in the compounding order.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified in the compounding order

controls.control_objective: To ensure pass the order based on available information/ documents
controls.control_description:
If the applicant does not opt
for personal hearing or absents on the day of hearing, Compounding Authority may
pass the order based on available information/ documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pass the order based on available information/ documents

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify the provisions of the fema, 1999 or any rule, regulation, notification, direction, or order issued in exercise of the powers under fema, 1999
controls.control_description:
6.3 The Compounding Order shall specify the provisions of the FEMA, 1999 or any
rule, regulation, notification, direction, or order issued in exercise of the powers under
FEMA, 1999 in respect of which contravention has taken place along with details of
the contravention.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify the provisions of the fema, 1999 or any rule, regulation, notification, direction, or order issued in exercise of the powers under fema, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the applicant and another copy shall also be provided to the adjudicating authority
controls.control_description:
6.4 One copy of the compounding order shall be provided to the applicant and another
copy shall also be provided to the Adjudicating Authority, where the compounding of
any contravention is made after making of a complaint under sub- section (3) of section
16 of the FEMA, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the applicant and another copy shall also be provided to the adjudicating authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure be hosted on the reserve bank's website (www
controls.control_description:
6.5 The summary information about the compounding orders passed on or after March
01, 2020, shall be hosted on the Reserve Bank's website (www.rbi.org.in) in the
following format:
Name of
Date of compounding
Amount imposed for compounding
Sr.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be hosted on the reserve bank's website (www

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid by way of demand draft in favour of the "reserve bank of india" or national electronic fund transfer (neft), or real time gross settlement (rt
controls.control_description:
7.1 The compounding amount as specified in the compounding order shall be paid by
way of demand draft in favour of the "Reserve Bank of India" or National Electronic
Fund Transfer (NEFT), or Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS), or such other
permissible electronic or online modes of payment within 15 days from the date of the
order of compounding of such contravention.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid by way of demand draft in favour of the "reserve bank of india" or national electronic fund transfer (neft), or real time gross settlement (rt

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated in the compounding order
controls.control_description:
The manner in which the demand draft
has to be drawn and deposited/ details of bank account for transferring through
electronic mode of payment shall be indicated in the compounding order.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated in the compounding order

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made as soon as possible, but not later than 2 hours from time of payment in the template provided in para b of annexure i
controls.control_description:
It may be
ensured that intimation of payment of amount for which contravention is compounded
shall be made as soon as possible, but not later than 2 hours from time of payment in
the template provided in Para B of Annexure I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made as soon as possible, but not later than 2 hours from time of payment in the template provided in para b of annexure i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed that the contravener had never made an application for compounding of any contravention under these rules
controls.control_description:
7.3 In case of failure to pay the sum compounded within the time specified in the
compounding order and Compounding Rules, 2024, it shall be deemed that the
contravener had never made an application for compounding of any contravention
under these Rules.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed that the contravener had never made an application for compounding of any contravention under these rules

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to such person
controls.control_description:
7.4 In respect of the contraventions of the FEMA, 1999 which are not compounded by
the Compounding Authority, the provisions of the Act for contravention shall apply to
such person.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to such person

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued by the reserve bank subject to the specified conditions
controls.control_description:
7.5 On realization of the sum for which contravention is compounded, a certificate in
this regard shall be issued by the Reserve Bank subject to the specified conditions, if
any, in the order.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued by the reserve bank subject to the specified conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be enhanced by 50% of earlier compounding amount subject to sub-para (i) above
controls.control_description:
02/2025-26 dated April 22, 2025
Prior to deletion it read as Paragraph 5.4.II.v If an applicant against whom a
compounding order had been passed earlier and applicant didn't pay the compounding
amount as mentioned in such order and reapplies for compounding of contravention
relating to the same transaction, the amount calculated as above may be enhanced by
50% of earlier compounding amount subject to sub-para (i) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be enhanced by 50% of earlier compounding amount subject to sub-para (i) above

Annexure II
• Nature of contravention and reasons for the contravention
• All supporting documents may be submitted
Overseas Direct Investment (ODI) Details to be furnished along with application for compounding of contravention relating to
Overseas Investment
• Name of the applicant
• Date of incorporation
• Income-tax PAN
• Nature of activities under taken (Please give NIC code - 1987)
• Name of Overseas entity
• Date of incorporation of overseas entity
• Nature of activities under taken by overseas entity
• Nature of entity- WOS/JV
• Details of remittance sent- Date of remittance;
